content.problemStatement:
Given two arrays, find their union. The union of two arrays should contain all the distinct elements present in both arrays.


Input Format

The first line contains two integers, NNN and MMM, representing the sizes of the first and second arrays, respectively.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, representing the elements of the first array.
The third line contains MMM space-separated integers, representing the elements of the second array.


Output Format
Print the distinct elements of the union of the two arrays in ascending order, separated by spaces.
